title: Firefighter Kit
description: Changing the textures of armor and axe to a firefighter kit [CIT]
body: ## Description This pack replaces the textures of the armor and axes with the texture of firefighter kit. This can set the situation on the servers, help in roleplay with the players. And it's also fun :) | Item (Diamond and Netherite) | Required name | |-----------------------------------------|:---------------------------:| | Axe | Firefighter Axe | | Axe | Firefighter Hammer | | Shovel | Firefighter Shovel | | Helmet | Firefighter Helmet | | Chestplate | Firefighter Jacket Gloved | | Chestplate | Firefighter Jacket | | Leggings | Firefighter Pants | | Boots | Firefighter Boots | ## Installing The resource pack must be placed in the resourcepacks folder in the .minecraft directory Default: * Windows: **C:\\Users\\%USERNAME%\\AppData\\Roaming\\.minecraft\\resourcepacks\\** * Linux: **~/.minecraft/resourcepacks** Next, in Minecraft, go to **[Settings]** -> **[Resource Packs]** -> Select the desired pack -> **[Done]** ## Requirements * Minecraft version above **1.14** * Installed [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (If you using Forge) * Installed [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (If you using Fabric) ## Feedback You can contact us via [email](mailto:mystyhaddock355@ya.ru) or [Discord](https://discord.com/users/817075264567115806). ## Finance/referal support [![🚀 Host with aéza – Fast, Secure & Affordable](https://img.shields.io/badge/aéza%20vps%20hosting-%E2%82%AC4.94%2Fmo%2B-purple?style=for-the-badge&logo=linux)](https://aeza.net/?ref=724303) ``` TGjiLho2eUMRAMPf6PUZs16EF2cvphnv8d ``` ``` 1dvL4mQf7cMmXhLc3A2tiyymVDF19TJnV ``` or USDC-Polygon ``` 0x390a54d13f62d62b4ee366aa23d4b0e0244c496f ``` ## My (our) projects
